name: MANNATECH INC
summary: Mannatech, Incorporated is a global wellness solution provider incorporated in November 1993, selling proprietary nutritional supplements, skin care and anti-aging products, and weight-management products. Products are distributed primarily through network marketing channels across 25 markets in the Americas, EMEA, and Asia/Pacific regions. In China, subsidiary Meitai operates a cross-border e-commerce model. Key proprietary ingredients include Ambrotose complex, Manapol powder, and MTech AO Blend.

products.name: Ambrotose complex
products.description: Proprietary blend of polysaccharides designed to support immune system and cell-to-cell communication.

products.name: Ambrotose AO
products.description: Proprietary antioxidant supplement using MTech AO Blend of antioxidant nutrients.

products.name: Advanced Ambrotose complex
products.description: Reformulated version with more potent concentration of mannose-containing polysaccharides from aloe.

products.name: PhytoMatrix
products.description: Proprietary blend of plant-based minerals, natural vitamins, and standardized phytochemicals.

products.name: BounceBack capsules
products.description: Proprietary proteolytic enzyme and phytosterol dietary supplement supporting natural recovery from physical activity.

products.name: OsoLean powder
products.description: Proprietary whey protein peptide supplement designed to assist targeted fat loss with exercise.

products.name: Omega-3
products.description: Supplement featuring EPA/DHA essential acids and Vitamin D3.

products.name: GI-ProBalance Slimstick
products.description: Symbiotic digestive product containing probiotics, prebiotics, and digestive enzymes.

products.name: PhytoBurst Nutritional Chews
products.description: Nutritional chews formulated with vitamins, minerals, and phytonutrients from food-sourced ingredients.

products.name: Uth skin cream
products.description: Anti-aging skin cream incorporating glyconutrient technology with microsphere delivery.

products.name: Catalyst and Glycentials
products.description: Proprietary vitamin/mineral supplements using the Ambroglycin blend for nutrient delivery.
